mapper.sql: id, order_no, member_id, course_id, status, amount, paid_amount, check_in, check_in_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM orders WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT o.* FROM orders o JOIN course c ON o.course_id = c.id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND o.status IN (1, 2) AND ( (c.start_time <= #{startTime} AND c.end_time > #{startTime}) OR (c.start_time < #{endTime} AND c.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (c.start_time >= #{startTime} AND c.end_time <= #{endTime}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, member_id, course_id, status, amount, paid_amount, check_in) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{memberId}, #{courseId}, #{status}, #{amount}, #{paidAmount}, #{checkIn})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET check_in = 1, check_in_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
